positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest at twilight. Giant glowing mushrooms, crystal streams, and miniature, friendly forest creatures like pixies and sprites are depicted. Style of Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, vibrant jewel tones, soft volumetric lighting, high detail, storybook quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
